message:
Consolidate interactive model-switching into switch_active_model with thinking-level clamping

Extract duplicated provider/session/thinking-level mutation logic from
cycle_model, apply_model_selection, and the /model slash command into a
single PiApp::switch_active_model method. The consolidated method also
clamps thinking level to Off when switching to a non-reasoning model,
recording the change in the session header. Add session_thinking_level()
helper.

Add tests for thinking-level clamping in both the keybinding cycle and
model-selector UI paths: cycle_model_clamps_thinking_level_for_non_reasoning_targets
and apply_model_selection_clamps_thinking_level_for_non_reasoning_targets.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
